_comment: The app embeds no client ids; in-app sign-in reads them from this file. On Windows install.ps1 writes it for you (Gemini/Codex/Copilot). On macOS/Linux copy this file to ~/.quotapanel/oauth-clients.json (macOS) or ~/.config/quotapanel/oauth-clients.json (Linux) and fill in the entries you want; add a 'claude' entry for in-app Claude sign-in. Keep only the entries you need. Precedence: env var > this file. Git-ignored; never commit the filled-in copy.
